2026-02-27T01:43:18.7404537Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-02-27T01:43:18.7405095Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:18.7405504Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:18.7405858Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:18.7406167Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:18.7406396Z [36;1m[0m
